parsedJson.summary: The site uses an outdated teal/black color scheme with busy hero imagery and multiple conflicting CTAs that reduce clarity for mobile visitors.

issues.title: 2010s-era teal/cyan accent color throughout
issues.what_observed: The primary accent color is a bright teal/cyan (#00CED1 range) used for all buttons, the top banner text '30+ YEARS OF EXPERIENCE', and overlay text like 'TRUSTED ROOFING EXPERTS IN BRISBANE'
issues.why_problem: This teal/cyan was popular in 2012-2016 web design but now signals an outdated business; local searchers associate modern roofing companies with earth tones (charcoal, navy, forest green) or warm accent colors, not neon cyan
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A 2025 roofing site would use a deep charcoal or navy base with a warm accent like coral, terracotta, or gold — colors that evoke trust, permanence, and Australian roofing heritage
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace all teal/cyan (#00CED1) with a warm coral or terracotta accent (#FF6B4A, #E07856); update all button backgrounds, banner backgrounds, and overlay text to use the new palette
issues.plain_explanation: 网站用的青绿色(teal)是2012-2016年流行的颜色,现在看起来过时了,会让访客觉得公司可能也不是最新的专业水平。
issues.customer_impact: 访客在8秒内会判断一个公司是否可信。过时的颜色会让人觉得这是一家老旧公司,可能技术和服务也跟不上,导致30-40%的访客直接离开去找看起来更现代的竞争对手。

issues.title: Three different CTAs on mobile confuse the visitor
issues.what_observed: On mobile, there are three teal buttons: 'Call Us Today!' appears twice (once mid-hero, once at bottom), plus an 'Enquire Now' button at the bottom — all identical in style with no hierarchy
issues.why_problem: When a mobile visitor searching 'roofing Brisbane' lands here, they face three identical-looking buttons and must decide which to tap; this creates decision paralysis and many will scroll past all three without acting
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A single prominent phone CTA above the fold ('Call Now' with the actual phone number visible) and one secondary form button below, with clear visual hierarchy — primary is larger/bolder, secondary is outlined or smaller
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove duplicate CTAs; show one primary 'Call [phone number]' button above fold in a warm accent color, make it tap-to-call; add one secondary 'Get Free Quote' button lower down in outlined style
issues.plain_explanation: 手机页面上有三个一模一样的按钮,访客不知道该点哪个,造成混乱。
issues.customer_impact: 移动端访客占本地搜索的70%以上,他们平均只会在页面停留10秒。如果CTA按钮不清晰,50%的访客会直接离开。一个清晰的'立即致电'按钮可以让电话咨询增加2-3倍。

issues.title: Busy corrugated iron background reduces text legibility
issues.what_observed: The hero image shows a worker on a corrugated metal roof with strong vertical line patterns; white text is overlaid with a dark semi-transparent overlay, but the corrugation ridges create visual noise behind 'EXPERIENCE THE WEATHERPROOF DIFFERENCE'
issues.why_problem: The corrugated pattern competes with the headline text, forcing visitors to work harder to read the value proposition; mobile visitors scrolling quickly may skip past entirely because the text doesn't pop cleanly
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A hero image with a simpler background (e.g. a finished roof against sky, a clean roofline) or a solid color block behind the text so white letters have clean contrast without competing patterns
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Either use a different hero image with a less busy background (blue sky, clean facade), or add a solid 80% black rectangle behind the headline text to ensure crisp legibility on all screens
issues.plain_explanation: 英雄区的波纹铁皮背景太花了,白色文字不够清晰,访客需要费力才能看清主标题。
issues.customer_impact: 如果访客在3秒内看不清您的核心卖点,他们会按返回键去找下一个搜索结果。特别是50岁以上的房主(屋顶修复的主要客户群),对低对比度文字更不耐烦,会直接流失掉20-30%的潜在客户。

issues.title: Desktop quote form asks for 7 fields above the fold
issues.what_observed: The right-side form on desktop labeled 'Get Your Free Quote Today!' contains 7 input fields (Name, Email, Phone Number, Service Type dropdown with 4 options including 'Roof Cleaning', 'Roof Painting', plus 'How long have you had your roofing for?' and 'Body text message box') all visible before scrolling
issues.why_problem: A local searcher who just found the site via 'roofing Brisbane' doesn't yet trust the business enough to fill in 7 fields; they'll see the form, feel it's too much work, and either leave or call a competitor with a simpler form
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A 2-3 field micro-form above the fold: Name, Phone, and a single-line 'What do you need?' text box, with a prominent submit button; or just a big 'Call Now' button with the phone number visible
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the 7-field form with a 3-field form: Name, Phone, and 'Tell us briefly what you need' (single line); move all other fields to a secondary detailed form on a separate 'Get Quote' page
issues.plain_explanation: 桌面版的报价表单要求填7个字段,对于刚找到网站的访客来说太多了,会让人觉得麻烦而放弃。
issues.customer_impact: 研究显示,表单每增加一个字段,完成率就下降10-15%。7个字段的表单只有5-8%的人会填完,而3个字段的表单有25-30%的人会提交。简化表单可以让您的询盘量翻3倍。

issues.title: Phone number not displayed on mobile or desktop
issues.what_observed: Neither screenshot shows an actual phone number anywhere — only 'Call Us Today!' buttons; the top navigation on desktop has a 'CONTACT' link but no visible click-to-call number in the header or hero area
issues.why_problem: 70% of local roofing searches are from mobile users who want to call immediately; if they can't see the phone number, they have to tap a button and wait for a page to load, or they'll just tap back and call the next result that shows a number
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Phone number displayed in the top-right of desktop header and directly below the logo on mobile (e.g. '07 3XXX XXXX' or '1300 XXX XXX') so it's tap-to-call without any extra steps
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add the business phone number in the desktop header top-right in a large, bold font; on mobile, place it directly below the logo in a tap-to-call format; keep it visible on scroll (sticky header)
issues.plain_explanation: 网站上没有显示电话号码,访客必须点按钮才能打电话,这会流失很多着急的客户。
issues.customer_impact: 移动端搜索'Brisbane 屋顶维修'的人,80%是遇到紧急问题(漏水、风暴损坏),他们想立刻打电话。如果看不到号码,60-70%会直接返回搜索结果打给下一家。您每个月可能因此损失20-40个电话咨询。

issues.title: Hero photo lacks local Brisbane specificity
issues.what_observed: The hero image shows a worker in a teal shirt on a corrugated roof, but it's shot from behind and could be any generic roofing company anywhere; there's no recognizable Brisbane context (no Queenslander-style homes, no local landmarks, no before/after of real local projects)
issues.why_problem: A searcher looking for 'roofing Brisbane' wants to see that you actually work in Brisbane on homes like theirs; a generic stock-style photo (even if it's a real photo) doesn't build local trust the way a recognizable local project would
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A hero image showing a completed roof restoration on a classic Brisbane Queenslander home, or a split-screen before/after of a real local project, or the team in front of a recognizable Brisbane suburb backdrop
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace hero image with a photo of a completed Queenslander roof restoration or a before/after of a real Brisbane project; add a caption like 'Recent restoration in Paddington' to reinforce local presence
issues.plain_explanation: 英雄区照片是通用的屋顶工人照片,看不出是在Brisbane本地,缺乏本地信任感。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索的客户想看到您真的在他们社区做过工程。展示真实的Brisbane本地项目照片可以让询盘转化率提高15-25%,因为访客会觉得'这家公司懂我们这里的房子'。

issues.title: Bright teal banner '30+ YEARS OF EXPERIENCE' adds visual clutter
issues.what_observed: A bright teal horizontal banner spans the full width at the very top with white text '30+ YEARS OF EXPERIENCE' on desktop and mobile
issues.why_problem: This banner takes up precious above-the-fold space and uses a loud color that draws the eye away from the hero message and CTA; the experience claim could be integrated into the hero or header more elegantly
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The '30+ years experience' claim integrated into the hero headline or as a small badge near the logo, freeing up vertical space for a cleaner hero and more visible CTA
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the teal banner; instead, add '30+ Years Serving Brisbane' as a small text badge below the logo, or integrate it into the hero subheading in a lighter weight font
issues.plain_explanation: 页面顶部的青绿色横幅占用了宝贵的屏幕空间,分散了访客对主信息和行动按钮的注意力。
issues.customer_impact: 移动端屏幕本来就小,每一寸空间都很宝贵。去掉这个横幅可以让主标题和'立即致电'按钮上移,让访客不用滚动就能看到核心信息和联系方式,提高10-15%的互动率。

positive_observations: The headline 'EXPERIENCE THE WEATHERPROOF DIFFERENCE. QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST' clearly communicates the value proposition and brand name
The site displays a real worker photo (even if generic) which is better than pure stock imagery and shows an actual person doing roofing work
Mobile version is responsive and text is legible at standard zoom levels
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace teal/cyan accent with a warm modern color (coral/terracotta) and simplify to one primary CTA above fold with visible phone number
2. Reduce desktop form from 7 fields to 3 fields (Name, Phone, Brief description) and display phone number prominently in header on all devices
3. Replace hero image with a recognizable Brisbane Queenslander roof project and add a solid text background for clean legibility
